text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.42 — CLI releases & CORS fixes

29 PRs merged this week. We shipped a new CLI, fixed browser SDKs, and moved a lot of models around to make them faster. Here is the breakdown.

───

→ THE TERMINAL IS THE FRONTEND
We cut v0.1.0 of the polli CLI. It includes a video demo skill and hardened publish CI. Sometimes you just want to generate things without leaving your terminal.

→ BROWSER SDKS & PLUMBING
Fixed CORS request headers so OpenAI SDKs actually work directly from browsers now. We also hid expired API keys from the dashboard and fixed enter usage exports for power users.

→ INFERENCE SPEEDRUNS
Migrated Kimi, Deepseek, GLM, Qwen-large, and Minimax to Fireworks AI. Sana Sprint 1.6B is now on GH200. We also added a reasoning flag for Gemini image models.

→ THE GREENHOUSE
14 new apps added to the showcase this week, including Neon Runner, Ciel AI, and Flashlearn. The community continues to build things faster than we can catalog them.

───

Everything is open source. Repo is public at github.com/pollinations/pollinations

#OpenSource #AI #DevTools
